overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tribal settlement at dusk. The character moves through wooden structures, ascends stairs, and explores both open and covered areas of the village with distinctive red and orange tribal architecture against a pink sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered entrance area with large root archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under a large wooden root structure toward a seated craftsman and a wooden staircase

notable_agents.action: tribal craftsman sitting by a workbench, working on materials

entered.detail: massive curved wooden root beams forming a shelter overhead with red and brown textures
steep wooden plank staircase leading upward to higher elevation
circular stone fire pit with glowing embers

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive wooden root archway in a tribal settlement. Aloy walks forward on a dirt path toward a seated craftsman working at a bench. To the right, a stone fire pit glows with embers, while ahead, a steep wooden staircase leads upward to the main settlement area above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with view of settlement

events.description: exits covered root structure into open air with full sky visibility
begins ascending steep wooden staircase, changing elevation significantly

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs while looking around the settlement, transitioning from sheltered to open area

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the edge of the elevated platform overlooking the lower area

entered.detail: large angular wooden building with decorated roof beams and yellow accent patterns
sprawling tribal village with multiple spiked roofs against pink sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Aloy ascends the wooden staircase from the covered entrance into an open elevated area. The camera reveals a sweeping view of the tribal settlement against a dramatic pink dusk sky. A large decorated longhouse stands to the left while the wooden walkway continues forward toward the main village center.

scene_state.functional_zone: open settlement plaza with multiple huts and market areas

events.description: approaching decorated structure with colorful hanging banners and tribal art

agents.ego_description: walking through the main settlement area, passing various NPCs and examining the tribal architecture

notable_agents.action: villager in red and yellow tribal clothing walking along the path

entered.detail: rough wooden support beams and platforms surrounding a structure under construction
strings of red, yellow, and blue triangular flags hanging between structures
large rock outcropping with dark entrance leading to interior spaces

segments.scene_description: Walking through the heart of the tribal settlement, Aloy passes wooden huts with colorful banners and scaffolding. The area is moderately populated with villagers going about their activities. The path leads toward a large rock formation with a cave entrance, while the pink sunset continues to illuminate the scene from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave interior with tribal paintings and fire lighting

events.description: enters cave-like interior space with painted walls and artificial fire lighting
ambient light shifts from natural sunset to warm orange fire glow from braziers

agents.ego_description: walking into the cave interior, passing NPCs and examining the painted wall decorations

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the back of the cave interior, facing away from camera

entered.detail: stone walls covered with yellow and red geometric tribal paintings and symbols
burning fire bowls on stands providing warm orange illumination
tropical ferns and purple flowers growing in stone planters

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters a cave-like interior space with dramatically different lighting. The walls are covered in yellow and red tribal paintings, illuminated by warm fire pits. The environment shifts from open outdoor settlement to enclosed sacred space with rock gardens and hanging fabrics, creating an intimate atmosphere distinct from the exterior areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the rustic outskirts of a tribal settlement into a secluded, sacred interior. It begins under a massive wooden root archway on a dirt path, passing a glowing fire pit and a craftsman before ascending a steep wooden staircase. As the camera climbs, the scene opens into an elevated village center characterized by decorated longhouses and colorful banners set against a dramatic pink dusk sky. The movement continues through the heart of the settlement, passing active villagers and scaffolding, before turning toward a large rock formation. Finally, the environment shifts from the open outdoor air into a cave-like interior, where the pink sunset is replaced by the warm glow of fire pits illuminating tribal paintings and hanging fabrics.
